
### HTTP requests 

<code>https://server.com/dir/file?query=string#anchor</code> <br> browser connects to server.com; <em>browser</em> sends: 

::: {style="border: 2px solid black; font-face: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;"}
[GET]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only} /dir/file?query=string HTTP/1.1<br/>
[Host: [server.com]{.fragment fragment-index=4 .custom .myem-only}{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}<br/>
[<i>Other-Key</i>: <i>Other-Value</i>]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}
<br>
…
:::

::: {.myoverbox .vlow .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

method: GET or POST most common<br/>
GET -- read web page<br/>
POST -- submit form

:::

::: {.myoverbox .vlow .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

headers: extra information with request

:::

::: {.myoverbox .vlow .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

example extra info: domain name from URL <br/>
servers can host multiple domains

:::


### HTTP responses 

<code>https://server.com/path/to/file?query=string#anchor</code> <br> after browser sends request; <em>server</em> sends: 

::: {style="border: 2px solid black; font-face: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;"}

HTTP/1.1 200 OK<br />
Content-Type: text/html<br />
<i>Other-Key</i>: <i>Other-Value</i><br />
&nbsp;<br />
&lt;html&gt;… 

:::
